geometric_properties.golden_rectangle: Rectangle with sides in ratio φ:1; removing a square leaves a smaller golden rectangle
geometric_properties.golden_spiral: Logarithmic spiral with growth factor φ per 90° turn
geometric_properties.regular_pentagon_diagonal: In a unit regular pentagon, diagonal = φ
geometric_properties.icosahedron: Three mutually perpendicular golden rectangles define icosahedron vertices
geometric_properties.penrose_rhombus: Diagonals of thick Penrose rhombus are in ratio φ:1

silver_ratio.name: Silver ratio (Pell constant)
silver_ratio.pell_numbers: Convergents of continued fraction [2;2,2,...] are Pell numbers: 1,2,5,12,29,70,169...

tribonacci_constant.name: Tribonacci constant
tribonacci_constant.connection: Limit of tribonacci sequence ratios T(n+1)/T(n)
tribonacci_constant.used_in: Some 3D quasiperiodic systems; related to 3-component substitution sequences

quasicrystal_relationships.penrose_inflation: Each inflation step scales by φ; tile frequency ratio thick:thin → φ:1 as n → ∞
quasicrystal_relationships.icosahedral_geometry: Ratios of body diagonals in icosahedron equal φ; icosahedron vertices defined by three mutually perpendicular golden rectangles
quasicrystal_relationships.fibonacci_connection: lim(n→∞) F(n+1)/F(n) = φ where F(n) are Fibonacci numbers
quasicrystal_relationships.ammann_beenker_inflation: Each inflation step scales by δ_S = 1+√2 (silver ratio)
quasicrystal_relationships.penrose_diagonal_ratio: Long diagonal of thick rhombus / short diagonal = φ
quasicrystal_relationships.penrose_thin_rhombus_diagonals: Diagonals of thin Penrose rhombus ratio = φ
quasicrystal_relationships.6D_hypercubic_projection: Icosahedral QC: projection of Z^6 with 6D basis vectors related to icosahedral rotations; φ appears in the 2×2 blocks as irrational part
quasicrystal_relationships.de_bruijn_pentagrid: Penrose P2/P3 can be constructed as dual of 5 sets of parallel lines (pentagrid); spacing involves 1/φ

identities.phi_power_recurrence: φ^n = F(n)·φ + F(n-1) for Fibonacci numbers F(n)

metadata.precision_note: Values given to 19 significant figures where known
